# Sage Nord

> Sage Nord (legal entity: Saga ApS) is a software engineering studio based
> in Denmark. It helps product teams turn ideas into software and AI that
> ship — and hold up.

Mission: To empower people through software.
Defining value: Trust — software reliable enough that people can depend on it.

## About
- A senior software studio. You work directly with the people doing the
  engineering — no layers, no handoffs.
- Based in Denmark; serves the Nordics and Europe.

## Services
- Consult: architecture reviews, technical strategy, unblocking engineering teams.
- Research: prototypes and technical due diligence to de-risk roadmaps.
- Develop: senior software engineering — performance, reliability, practical AI.
- Integrate: connecting products to platforms, data, and AI models cleanly.
- Maintain: ongoing stewardship that keeps software trustworthy after launch.

## Focus (0 → 1)
- Products: software products from prototype to launch.
- AI: practical, private, product-grade AI woven into the experience.

## Contact
- Email: hello@sagenord.com
- Website: https://sorunokoe.github.io/SageNord/ (moving to https://sagenord.com)
